steps.name: Creating Inwarranty job with Create job api
Setting up the BASE URI and CONTENT TYPE AS Application/json and attaching the SensitiveDataFilter for a role and attaching payload
Getting the Property value from config file
Getting the auth Token for the role

parameters.name: payload
parameters.value: CreateJobPayload[mst_service_location_id=1, mst_platform_id=2, mst_warrenty_status_id=1, mst_oem_id=1, customer=Customer[first_name=so10Ten, last_name=Bond, mobile_number=7740778470, mobile_number_alt=, email_id=stem10@gmail.com, email_id_alt=], customer_address=CustomerAddress[flat_number=711, apartment_name=Avito, street_name=BakerSt, landmark=pizzahut, area=pune, pincode=411014, country=India, state=MH], customer_product=CustomerProduct[dop=2026-06-23T19:54:25.051605907Z, serial_number=81939644257828, imei1=81939644257828, imei2=81939644257828, popurl=2026-06-23T19:54:25.051719040Z, product_id=1, mst_model_id=1], problems=[Problems[id=5, remark=Over Heating]]]
